name: coach-buddy
description: Thinking partner for Agile coaches — install into Claude Code, Cursor, or use in a Claude Chat Project

scripts.build:plugin: rm -f "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" && cd plugins/coach-buddy && zip -r "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" . -x '*.DS_Store' && cp "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" ../../coach-buddy.plugin && cd ../.. && node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugins/coach-buddy/.claude-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); if(!p.skills){console.error('ERROR: plugin.json missing skills field');process.exit(1);}" && claude plugin validate plugins/coach-buddy/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && echo '✅ coach-buddy.plugin ready'
scripts.build:plugin:ci: rm -f /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin && cd plugins/coach-buddy && zip -r /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin . -x '*.DS_Store' && cp /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin ../../coach-buddy.plugin && cd ../.. && node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugins/coach-buddy/.claude-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); if(!p.skills){console.error('ERROR: plugin.json missing skills field');process.exit(1);} if(!p.name||!p.description){console.error('ERROR: plugin.json missing required fields');process.exit(1);} console.log('plugin.json schema check passed')" && echo '✅ coach-buddy.plugin ready'
